scripts.type-check: npm run -w @intake/core type-check && npm run -w @intake/vue type-check
scripts.codegen: npm run codegen:ts && npm run codegen:go
scripts.codegen:ts: json2ts -i schema/payload.v1.json -o core/src/generated/payload.ts --no-additionalProperties --bannerComment "// GENERATED from schema/payload.v1.json — DO NOT EDIT. Run: npm run codegen"
scripts.validate-schema:reject: ajv validate --spec=draft2020 --all-errors -c ajv-formats -s schema/payload.v1.json -d schema/testdata/payload.invalid.json && exit 1 || exit 0
